info.title: Kenqo Clinical Intelligence API
info.description: DME intake automation platform — lymphedema compression treatment · Medicare FFS · Phase 1

post.description: Creates a new user. Role must be `admin` or `superadmin`. If role is `admin`, a GCS folder is automatically created. Pass `superadmin_id` to link admin to a superadmin's KB.
Authenticates user with email and password. Returns a JWT bearer token valid for 24 hours.

patch.description: Superadmin only. Changes a user's role between `admin` and `superadmin`. If changed to `admin`, a GCS folder is automatically created.

get.description: Superadmin only. Returns all users with their roles and status.
Returns the currently active kb_id per disease.

get.summary: Get active knowledge base for disease

post.description: Sets which kb_id the validation engine will use for this disease.

patch.description: Update the anchor tags for a document type. Anchors are keyword phrases the classifier uses to identify this document type.

post.description: Upload a Medicare policy PDF. Saves to GCS, creates a DB record, publishes to Pub/Sub for async ingestion.

get.description: Returns all valid options for the upload form dropdowns.
Returns all ingested documents with status. Optionally filter by disease.
Poll ingestion progress. Returns status, step, chunks added, rules added.

delete.description: Deletes document from DB, removes PDF from GCS, removes all chunks and rules.

get.description: Returns rules for a disease. Filter by status. Pass latest_only=true to get only current versions, excluding deprecated history.

post.description: Publishes to Pub/Sub — worker runs AI merge detection and writes results to merge_suggestions.json.

post.summary: Flag a rule pair as merge suggestion

post.description: Single Gemini call — detailed analysis of specific rules. Returns recommendation + full merged rule draft.
Merge all rule_id_bs into rule_id_a. LLM_REASONING rules require merged_rule_draft unless force=true.

put.description: Fix 25: versioned update — snapshots current state before applying changes.

get.summary: Get version history of a rule
get.description:
Fix 24: Returns all versions of a rule — current + all deprecated snapshots —
sorted oldest to newest. Essential for Medicare compliance audit trails.
Single endpoint returning all data needed for the superadmin dashboard.
Returns the current hcpcs_reference.json for a disease.

post.description: Reads all approved/pending rules and builds hcpcs_reference.json. Call after ingestion completes.

get.description: Returns build status for every payer × condition cell. Shows coverage_pct, support_status, and rule counts.

patch.description: Manually set support_status (SUPPORTED | PARTIAL | UNSUPPORTED_KNOWN | UNKNOWN) and/or notes. coverage_pct is auto-calculated — do not set it here.

post.description:
Create a new order and upload documents.
All GCS uploads happen before any DB writes.

get.description: List all orders for this tenant.
Poll extraction status. Handles stale order detection safely.

post.description:
Handle CSR decision points:
- continue_existing_patient
- continue_new_patient
- continue_existing_order
- start_new_order
- confirm_identity
- proceed_mismatch
- cancel_mismatch
- resume / fresh (legacy-compatible aliases)

get.description: Get all extracted fields for an order.

patch.description: CSR edits a field value. Stores full edit history.

post.description:
CSR resolves a conflict field.
Can pick option 1, option 2, or type a custom value.

delete.description:
Delete a flagged/wrong document.
Not allowed if order is complete.

get.description: List patients for this tenant. Used for manual selection dropdown.

patch.description: Update patient details. Used to fill identity_incomplete patients.

get.description: Get all orders for a patient including claims history.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Register users, login, and manage roles

tags.name: Prompts
tags.description: Manage global chunk summary and rules extraction prompts

tags.name: Diseases
tags.description: Create and manage disease configurations (lymphedema, diabetes etc.)

tags.name: Extraction Schema
tags.description: Manage extraction fields per disease — add, edit, remove, toggle fields

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Manage extraction agent prompts and active/inactive status per disease

tags.name: Classifier
tags.description: Manage document classifier prompt and document types per disease

tags.name: Mapping
tags.description: Manage agent to field mappings per disease

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Upload and manage policy documents for knowledge base ingestion

tags.name: Rules
tags.description: Manage extracted rules — approve, edit, merge, delete

tags.name: HCPCS Reference
tags.description: Build and retrieve HCPCS code classification reference per disease

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Single endpoint returning all dashboard data
